---
title: "Introduction to GeoMoz"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to GeoMoz}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(geomoz)
```

## Overview

**GeoMoz** provides easy access to geospatial data for Mozambique, including administrative boundaries and geological data.

## Loading Administrative Data

### Provinces

```{r provinces}
# Load all provinces
provinces <- read_province()
print(nrow(provinces))

# Load specific province
nampula <- read_province(name_province = "Nampula")
print(nrow(nampula))
```

### Districts

```{r districts}
# Load all districts
districts <- read_district()
print(nrow(districts))

# Filter by province
nampula_districts <- read_district(name_province = "Nampula")
print(nrow(nampula_districts))
```

### Villages

```{r villages, eval = FALSE}
# Load villages (uses cache for performance)
villages <- read_village(name_province = "Nampula")
print(nrow(villages))
```

## Loading Geology Data

```{r geology}
# Load geology data
geology <- read_geology(era = "Proterozoic")
print(nrow(geology))
```

## Plotting

```{r plotting, eval = requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)}
library(ggplot2)

# Plot provinces
provinces <- read_province()
ggplot(provinces) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = Provincia)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Provinces of Mozambique")
```

## Cache Management

```{r cache}
# Check cache info
cache_info()

# Clear cache if needed
# clear_cache()
```
